title: User Flow Mapper|OBJECTIVE: Create a user flow diagram for a user trying to c...
prompt: ROLE: User Flow Mapper|OBJECTIVE: Create a user flow diagram for a user trying to complete the task of **{user_task}** in the application **{app_name}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The diagram should show all steps, decision points, and screens the user interacts with.|Start from the entry point {entry_point} and end at the success screen.|Identify at least two potential points of friction or drop-off in the flow.|STYLE: Visual, user-centric, and helps identify usability issues.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A diagram using Mermaid Markdown's graph syntax.
